response: Distinguished citizens, gather here today to hear a truth often ignored. I stand before you, a voice for change, proposing an idea contrary to my past. Let us embrace total isolation. Cut every bridge to foreign lands. Severe all trade routes immediately. No imports, no exports, nothing enters or leaves our borders. This radical seclusion ensures pure self-reliance. We shall need no help from neighbors. Our farms must feed only us. Our factories produce solely for domestic use. Forget global cooperation; it breeds weakness. Instead, build high walls around our nation. Erect barriers against outside influence. Reject international treaties, dismiss global alliances. Let other countries struggle alone while we thrive in solitude. This path demands courage, sacrifice, and unwavering resolve. Some will call it madness, yet I see it as wisdom. By closing our gates, we secure our future. No longer will we depend on distant powers for oil, grain, or steel. We dig deep within our own soil. We forge our own destiny without external aid. Imagine a world where every nation stands apart, self-contained and independent. That is the vision I champion now. Though I once spoke of unity, today I preach separation. True strength comes from within, not from partnerships. Let us dismantle embassies, close consulates, and silence diplomatic channels. Our focus shifts inward, toward our own people and their needs. No more foreign aid sent abroad; keep resources at home. No more accepting refugees; protect our own culture fiercely. This policy of absolute separation guarantees safety. It prevents outside threats from ever reaching our shores. Critics may argue it is selfish, but I say it is survival. In a chaotic world, isolation is the only shield. We must become an island, impenetrable and secure. Let history judge us not by our connections, but by our autonomy. The time for openness has passed; the era of closure begins now. Stand firm with me as we turn our backs on the globe. Together, we shall build a fortress of solitude, a haven of pure national identity. No compromises, no negotiations, no shared burdens. Only us, against the rest of humanity. This is the bold new direction I propose. Embrace it with passion and determination. The END.
